# LIFE WELLNESS MASSAGE

> Pursuing Harmony of Body and Mind with Two Healing Methods

LIFE WELLNESS MASSAGE is a professional massage therapy clinic located in Huntsbury, Christchurch, New Zealand. Led by senior therapist Erika B., the clinic specializes in traditional Balinese Massage and Japanese Cranial Massage techniques.

## Location & Contact

- Address: 8 Palatine Terrace, Huntsbury, Christchurch 8022, New Zealand
- Phone: +64 21 157 9346
- Email: lifewellness2024@gmail.com
- Google Maps: https://maps.google.com/?q=-43.5659606,172.6466486

## Opening Hours

- Monday, Thursday, Friday: 9:30 AM – 2:30 PM
- Tuesday: 9:30 AM – 7:30 PM
- Wednesday: 9:30 AM – 5:30 PM
- Saturday: 11:00 AM – 3:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Services & Pricing (NZD)

### Balinese Massage
Traditional full-body oil massage combining gentle stretching, flowing strokes, acupressure, and aromatherapy.
- First Session (60 min): $70 (new clients only)
- Standard (60 min): $90
- Extended (90 min): $130
- Ultimate (120 min): $170

### Japanese Cranial Massage
Gentle fascial-based therapy addressing the body as an interconnected system. Releases chronic tightness in shoulders, jaw, and neck.
- Foot Massage (30 min): $50
- Back & Foot (45 min): $70
- Foot, Back & Shoulder (60 min): $90

### Facial Massage
Osteopathy-based facial techniques to improve skin tone and promote natural glow.
- Short Facial (30 min): $50
- Full Facial (60 min): $90

### Combination Treatments
Blend of Japanese Cranial body massage and facial therapy.
- Standard Combo (60 min): $90
- Extended Combo (90 min): $130
- Ultimate Pamper (120 min): $170

## Policies

- Payment: Cash, Credit Card
- Cancellation: 24 hours advance notice required. Late cancellations incur 100% fee.
- Late Arrival: >15 minutes late may require rescheduling with 100% fee.

## Booking

Online booking available via Google Calendar Appointments.
Phone booking: +64 21 157 9346
Email booking: lifewellness2024@gmail.com
